I chose this life with the mission of exposing the mechanics of this reality;
empowering you to turn up the temperature of your belief

A New Perspective

When I was in my youth, I uncovered suppressed memories of existence before life on this earth as a human. I experienced a distress call within an endless sea of infinite simultaneous nothing and everything.

The Earth. Humanity. War, Pollution, and Hunger. Anger, Greed, and Fear.

I couldn't understand these things from outside the human perspective, as it was obvious that each and every human was a being of infinite creative potential, suffering incarceration by endless needless shackles of limitation and self restriction of their own design.

I sought to help humanity understand their true nature, and free them of their self-inflicted suffering, so that they may appreciate their magnificent nature and the endless beauty of their sapphire home.

I was given a choice. I could incarnate myself as a human, and tell them myself as one of them. But there was a catch. I too would forget my own nature as a being of infinite creative potential.

Perhaps in hubris, I accepted the challenge.

I was given the opportunity to choose the life I would live. Not set in stone, but like a tree with endless leaves of possibility. I chose this life and began the journey.

I remember fading in and out of a developing body, slowly feeling my consciousness experience ever growing and expanding physical form. Until one moment, a flash. I cried out. It was cold, but another sensation drove this discomfort. Like a serrated knife tearing me apart from everything I had known.

I forgot.

Sounds like the intro to a bad indie movie. I know. And that is why it has taken me 32 years to share this with more than only those closest to me.

Now I begin my primary objective. What I came here to do: to share my story, the insights therein, and help you understand and begin the journey of your own.

Let's climb the tree of life together.

© Graham Mowatt
